Video.summary: Rich and Dreama, bribed Dreama's sister, Tabby, to have sex with them before they would baby-sit her children so she could go to work at her local go go club. Then Steve is tired of supporting his daughter, Christy, and her lazy boyfriend.
Video.title: Country Lovin'!

Video.summary: A woman acts as her daughter's pimp; a man's mother and girlfriend feud.
Video.title: Aspiring Prostitutes & a Drunk

Video.summary: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!
Video.title: I Want Your Lover!

Video.summary: Antoine has been hiding the fact that he is gay from his family and his girlfriend. Now he wants to let them know the truth, and furthermore that he has been having a relationship with his sisters boyfriend.
Video.title: A Gay Family Affair

Video.summary: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!
Video.title: Your Sister Gave It Up!

Video.summary: Cooda's tells his girlfriend that their relationship is over because he's gay and he's running off with a male lover! Then Kathy has always been fond of sharing with best friend Cindy, but that never included Cindy's husband Marquis!
Video.title: You Cheated...So Beat It

Video.summary: A man wants to leave his wife for one of her friends; a man sleeps with his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal

Image.alt: A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal
A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal
A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal

Video.summary: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.
Video.title: Engagements Explode!

Video.summary: Jordan admits that he has not been faithful to his girlfriend; Shay confesses that she has shared a lot with her best friend; Trisha learns that her fiance slept with her friend again.
Video.title: Bitter BFFs

Video.summary: Beep runs a convenience store and he's fallen in love with the girlfriend of one of the patrons.
Video.title: Amazing Tales IV

Video.summary: Taylor's here to reveal that he's been cheating on Jenna with another girl and her stripper cousin! Then, it's a sibling rivalry for the ages when Cody finds out that his girl Amanda has been cheating on him with his own brother Brandon!
Video.title: Your Tears Mean Nothing

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Matt’s latest affair with Danielle’s mom’s roommate could be her mom’s breaking point! John has been experimenting with his roommate Ray behind Mahogany’s back! Rich is ready to ditch Tina for her more mature mom Shelly!
Video.title: I Want A Divorce!

Video.summary: Victoria says Dewayne harasses her, calls her horrible names and is physically abusive toward her; wedding plans are on hold until Trenell can pass a lie detector test.
Video.title: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Image.alt: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Video.summary: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?
Video.title: Steve Over the Edge

Video.summary: Violet's baby was brutally beaten to death by a caretaker; David says his estranged wife's story did not add up after their daughter suffered severe injuries.
Video.title: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Image.alt: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Video.summary: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her abusive boyfriend Michael of 11 months. Michael says Betty abuses him, too, but Scott and Dawn don’t believe him. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
Video.title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Image.alt: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Video.summary: After 10 years of searching, Brenda will reunite with her kids and address abuse allegations. Then, Cassidy wed Paul 5 days after she split with PJ, but is he molesting her and PJ’s son? Or is PJ the monster who burned their son’s feet?
Video.title: "I'm Terrified of the Results"

Video.summary: Pam suffered two miscarriages from the stress of her boyfriend Miguel’s cheating accusations. Felisha confessed to cheating on her boyfriend Natron, but Natron denies fathering her two kids. The truth shall set some of these guests free!
Video.title: Did You Not Hear the Results?

Image.alt: Did You Not Hear the Results?
Did You Not Hear the Results?
Did You Not Hear the Results?

Video.summary: David believes his wife Shamonda is cheating on him and that she might be having sex for money! Plus, Matt believes that his girlfriend is a prostitute. She admits she has accepted money and gifts from men, but swears she gave nothing in return.
Video.title: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Image.alt: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Video.summary: Young teens say that they're suicidal because of all the abuse they've suffered at the hands of a bully who won't leave them alone.
Video.title: Tormented Teens Confront Their Bullies

Video.summary: Mother's stand up to their violent and abusive children once and for all.
Video.title: Teen Girls Gone Bad

Video.summary: Girlfriends confront their boyfriends who dumped them because they refused to get abortions and refuse to be involved in the baby’s life.
Video.title: Pregnant Ultimatums

Video.summary: These guests are all in for a surprise when their dreams come true.
Video.title: Dreams Come True!

Video.summary: Children meet their fathers for the first time In this emotional episode.
Video.title: More Paternity Updates

Video.summary: Teenage girls in a race to grow up begin having sex without considering the consequences.
Video.title: All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex

Image.alt: All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex
All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex
All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex

Video.summary: Teenage girls do whatever they want at the expense of their mother's sanity.
Video.title: I Want to Divorce My Teen

Image.alt: I Want to Divorce My Teen
I Want to Divorce My Teen
I Want to Divorce My Teen

Video.summary: World renowned psychic Sylvia Browne helps investigate missing children.
Video.title: Psychic Solves Murder Mysteries

Video.summary: These guests have no idea who their secret admirers are, but they are about to find out!
Video.title: Surprise! I'm Your Secret Love!

Video.summary: Linda, once teased for being fat and geeky, transforms into a bombshell ready to confront her past.
Video.title: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!

Image.alt: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!

Video.summary: Babies having babies. These mother's show concern for their underage pregnant daughters.
Video.title: I'm Only 12 . . . And Im Pregnant

Video.summary: Parents, Siblings, and Children meet their families for the first time.
Video.title: I Never Knew I Had a Family

Image.alt: I Never Knew I Had a Family
I Never Knew I Had a Family
I Never Knew I Had a Family
